modules.title: AAFP VC Outline — Content Generation
callouts: session_hy_inserts_v7.json is the canonical definition of VC-cited articles and the routing gate for Module B.

modules.title: Match · Route · Rename
modules.description: Plain-named PDFs → propose ART-ID → cross-check VC gate → human review → rename

routing_logic.if_not_in_vc_gate: Route to local_lite (Module C DB-only synthesis)
